overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through shallow red-tinted water at night, holding a torch. The character approaches ancient Greek-style ruins and a wooden dock structure under moonlight, eventually reaching wooden stairs leading out of the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow red water with ancient ruins in background

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow red water holding a lit torch, heading toward distant ruins

entered.detail: stone ruins of ancient Greek-style structures visible on the horizon against the night sky
tall stone column standing among the ruins
dark trees and bushes lining the left side of the water area
large boulders and rocks scattered on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow red-tinted water under a moonlit sky, holding a torch. Ancient stone ruins stand in the distance while vegetation lines the edges of the water area.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden dock with stone blocks and lit torches

events.description: wooden dock structure with lit torches becomes visible ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water toward a wooden dock platform with burning torches

entered.detail: wooden platform with railings extending over the water, lit by torches
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the dock edge
wooden stairs leading up from the water to the dock platform
burning torch mounted on a post providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden dock structure with burning torches. Large rocks pass by on the right as the wooden stairs and platform become more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairs leading up from red water to dock platform

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs out of the water onto the dock platform

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs from the water onto the dock platform, approaching the lit area

entered.detail: rope barriers along the edge of the dock
wooden building or wall at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character reaches and ascends the wooden stairs leading out of the red water onto the dock platform. The torch illuminates the wooden planks and railings as the character approaches the structure at the top.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through shallow, red-tinted waters that lead toward an illuminated wooden dock. It begins with the character wading through the crimson tide under a moonlit sky, moving past distant stone ruins and shoreline vegetation while holding a torch. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a wooden dock structure where burning torches flicker, with large rocks passing by on the right as the platform ahead becomes more prominent. The camera then follows the character as they reach and ascend the wooden stairs, leaving the red water behind. Finally, the torchlight illuminates the wooden planks and railings as the character climbs toward the top of the structure.
